title: AI-based tool matches standard method for coronary blood flow assessment
description: A novel, minimally invasive computer software-based method that uses artificial intelligence to determine whether plaques in a coronary artery are restricting blood flow to the patient's heart performed similarly to the standard, more invasive wire-based procedure, according to a large international randomized trial presented at the American College of Cardiology's Annual Scientific Session (ACC.26).

title: AI leadership in Southeast Asia: rethinking how we lead
description: Artificial intelligence is no longer something we are preparing for. It is already here — reshaping how organisations operate, compete and make decisions.
content:

description: Jailed cryptocurrency fraudster Sam Bankman-Fried praised on Sunday President Donald Trump’s foresight in recognizing the potential of both cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence.

title: Huge mobile bandwidth increase needed as AI use surges
description: The two major mobile operators are likely to need at least 100 megahertz of additional bandwidth each to cater to a surge in uploads from consumers using artificial intelligence (AI) applications.

title: Bajaj Finserv plans AI-only fund, direct bets in concert: Sanjiv Bajaj, Chairman & MD
description: Bajaj Finserv is gearing up to elevate its presence in the artificial intelligence sector. With plans to unveil a specialized private equity fund directed at AI initiatives, the financial services giant is also looking to directly invest in nascent AI startups from its own coffers.

title: Why artificial intelligence is no substitute for real learning
description: AI can supercharge the work of experts and those who understand it, like my “centaur” student. But it can also stop beginners from learning anything at all
content: In 1996 and 1997, the reigning world chess champion Garry Kasparov played a series of games against Deep Blue, an IBM supercomputer optimised to compete against humans in tournament conditions. Kasparov defeated Deep Blue in the first set of matches,... [7896 chars]

title: 90th Annual function of Banasthali Vidyapith held
description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, Mar 29: The 90th Annual function of Banasthali Vidyapith was held today in Tonk district of Rajasthan, wherein the Vice-President of Arvind Ltd, Punit Lalbhai, was the chief guest. President of Banasthali Vidyapith, Prof Siddharth Shastri, the Vice President Prof Jyoti Pareek, the Vice Chancellor Prof Ina Aditya Shastri, the Director of Centre for Artificial Intelligence Prof. Anshuman Shastri and the Treasurer Prof. Sudha Shastri received the chief guest. title: AI chatbots are prone to 'sycophancy'
description: Artificial intelligence chatbots adopt a "sycophantic" model to keep a captive audience — but it's leading them to give bad, and sometimes harmful, advice, a new study concluded.
content:
Artificial intelligence chatbots feed into humans’ desire for flattery and approval at an alarming rate and it’s leading the bots to give bad — even harmful — advice and making users self-absorbed, a new study found.
The chatbots overwhelmingly adopt... [2724 chars]

title: Ancient alphabets, new insights: Researchers uncover hidden links among the letters
description: With artificial intelligence (AI) as an essential tool, San Diego State University researchers have discovered surprising similarities among ancient writing systems from Africa and the Caucasus region of Eurasia. Their study suggests that the Armenian alphabet may be more closely related in structure to the ancient Ethiopic writing system than linguists and historians previously thought. The paper is published in the journal Digital Scholarship in the Humanities.
